specs.title: Hospeda mobile app (React Native / Expo)
specs.origin: Design session 'panel 1.1' (2026-06-15): master/umbrella spec, RN/Expo, tourist+host; split into sub-specs

specs.title: IVA/Tax Handling and ARCA Electronic Invoicing
AI Foundation Package (provider-agnostic @repo/ai-core)
specs.note: FOUNDATION spec for adding AI to Hospeda. Only the infra: @repo/ai-core package (provider-agnostic, Vercel AI SDK wrapped), admin-managed config (new PermissionEnum.AI_SETTINGS_MANAGE, SUPER_ADMIN), encrypted secrets vault (keys editable from admin, decrypted in apps/api, passed to package by param), usage metering + per-plan entitlement enforcement (login required for ALL AI, no anonymous), cost ceiling + kill-switch + threshold alerts via @repo/notifications, SSE streaming primitive, safety layer (rate-limit + injection guard + moderation + PII scrub for external telemetry), tables in @repo/db (NOT portable — conscious tradeoff, DB access isolated in storage/). Multi-provider = fallback + per-feature routing (V1); advanced routing + vector DB/embeddings + async jobs = V2. 4 V1 features (text improvement, NL search, accommodation chat, admin tech-support) are CHILD specs, out of scope here. Allocated SPEC-173 = max(git=172, engram-stale=144)+1. SS12 mandatory decision protocol: consult owner on ANY ambiguity. Tasks not yet atomized; 7 blocking open questions in spec.md SS8.
specs.completionRef: PR #1466 merged to staging (28e726d3b), 43/43 tasks, judgment-day double-APPROVED

specs.title: Admin Navigation & URL Coverage Audit
specs.origin: Owner request (2026-06-27): verify every registered admin URL is reachable from the UI, add missing links, remove dead routes, reorder sidebar/menus. DISCOVERY-FIRST chore; Phase 1 = build the full route-vs-nav coverage matrix. Key finding: nav source-of-truth is 2 files (config/ia/sidebars.ts + sections.ts); ~167 route files; 5 confirmed gap candidates + 1 duplicate (/platform/ops/webhooks).

specs.title: Remediate the WCAG violations baselined by the A11y Sweep (SPEC-270 / SPEC-294 follow-up)
specs.origin: Surfaced during SPEC-294 (PR #1914, 2026-06-30): once the A11y Sweep ran green end-to-end, axe-core reported 84 real WCAG violations (6 critical, 56 serious). SPEC-294 baselined them so the workflow gates on regressions; this spec owns clearing the baseline.

specs.title: Featured Listing — Addon Source + Hardening
specs.origin: Followup to SPEC-292 (merged PR #1930). The adversarial review surfaced one HIGH gap + Medium hardening items deferred from SPEC-292: H-1 the visibility-boost addons grant FEATURED_LISTING at the customer level but only the plan source was wired (loadEntitlements resolves plan UNION addon); M-3 syncFeaturedByPlan does not trigger ISR revalidation; M-4 the 8 billing hooks lack direct tests; M-5 paused/comp status divergence between hooks and the reconcile cron. This spec wires the addon source and hardens the wiring.
